plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-183 RP05.P04.M04.S18-RP05.P04.M06.S15 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-183 adds descriptor-only Matter Core UI evidence, permission/audit binding, Claude leak prompt inputs, closeout handoff, and synthetic fixture set coverage on top of CP00-182.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-183 matter core ui evidence permission fixture pack
